title: Quantum Oracle Sketching — Examples / Quick-Start
subtitle: Compact recipes covering every QOS use case in one notebook, importing from oracle_sketching.py + quantum_ml.py + classical_shadow.py
description: Quick-start tour of the QOS library: Boolean phase oracle, real-valued state sketch, matrix block encoding, linear-system solving, LS-SVM classification, PCA, interferometric-shadow readout, and streaming view — each as a 3-5-cell recipe. Companion to the deep-dive notebooks in this directory.
